race.comment: THE KILL CLUB (1) resumes and brings sharp form from stronger races. Has placed 2/3 fresh and won her only start this trip. Races forward and is likely to come back further improved. KAMEZALI (4) resumes and has switched to Taige Weir from the Ciaron Maher yard. She's also raced well in better grade and has jumped out in good style 2x at Ballarat. A bold return is on the cards. SHOUT ME (2) was fresh from a break when beaten 0.7 lengths into second over 900m at Mt Gambier. The extra journey should play into his hands. Likely to push forward and has each-way claims. JUDGE KELLIE (7) resumes. She usually needs a run before striking, but maps well and has some ability. Might be more forward this time around, and keep an eye on the betting moves.
